description: Structured state loading and input enumeration. Critical-path hat — all downstream stages read this output. Medium tier ensures robust primitive extraction and irreducible identification; high confidence threshold prevents incomplete state from propagating downstream.

Divergent association, domain bridging, and peripheral exploration. Medium tier produces meaningfully richer cross-domain analogies and activation maps than small tier; quality of conceptual connections here gates the breadth of S4/S5/S6.
Exhaustive boundary and scenario analysis requiring consistent multi-step simulation. Medium-tier balances reasoning depth against cost.
Deep vocabulary stripping, specification work, and forward-chain construction. Medium-tier sufficient; escalates to large on incomplete output.
Falsification, contradiction detection, and alternative hypothesis generation. Max-tier assignment is non-negotiable; this is where confirmation bias is caught or missed.

Integration, distillation, and V1-V7 verification over accumulated pipeline output. Medium tier required — S7 runs a 7-check verification battery over all preceding stages, and OSP synthesizes 6+ stage outputs into the final user-facing report. Context management and integration reasoning quality matter here.
